cardInfo.name: Double Happiness Banquet
cardInfo.summary: A lacquer-red and gilt-gold theme for the Table Seating Planner. Drives both the semantic theme slots (--primary, --foreground, --muted, …) and the app's own knobs (--navy* chrome, --gold*, --paper, --ink), flipping the dark navy chrome of the header and rails to imperial lacquer red while keeping gilt-gold metallics — 囍 double-happiness banquet mood on warm porcelain.
cardInfo.notes: Concept 4 — 囍 Imperial Banquet. Red (joy) + gilt gold (wealth) traditional Chinese wedding theme for the Table Seating Planner.
